---
title: "ENVS-193DS_homework-03-DOC"
author: "Megan Zhao"
date: 5/28/26
format: pdf
editor: source
messages: false
warning: false
---

# Set Up

Packages

```{r}
#| label: packages

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)

```

Data: 

```{r}
#| label: data

kelp <- read.csv()
```


# Problem 1
# Problem 2
# Problem 3
# Problem 4
